makefile_targets.name: make fmt
makefile_targets.description: Format code using golangci-lint fmt and go fmt

linting.notes: golangci-lint v2 with comprehensive configuration. Enables all linters by default, disables specific noisy ones. Custom rules for test files. Requires Go 1.24+ toolchain (auto-downloads via GOTOOLCHAIN=auto). Lint runs clean with 0 issues.

env_vars: GOTOOLCHAIN=auto - enables automatic Go toolchain version download
testing.fixtures_location: Test data defined as package-level constants in test files

test_patterns.framework: Standard Go testing with Gomega assertions

testing.notes: Requires Go 1.25.7 (specified in go.mod). Use GOTOOLCHAIN=auto to auto-download. 741+ tests across packages. Tests use Gomega for assertions (not Ginkgo). Comprehensive test guidelines in docs/testing.md. All tests passed successfully during validation.

steps: Set up Go from go.mod (uses go-version-file)

dev-container.description: Build and push dev container image

release-container.description: Build and push release container image

ci.notes: CI uses GitHub Actions setup-go with go-version-file which reads from go.mod. Test and lint are gating checks that run on all pull requests. Container builds only on push to main or releases.

build.notes: Requires Go 1.25.7. Build uses GOTOOLCHAIN=auto to download correct version. Binary verified working (version command executed successfully). CGO disabled for static binaries.

conventions.test_naming: Test* functions with t.Run() for subtests
conventions.import_style: Standard lib, external deps, k8s.io packages, project packages, dot imports. Configured via gci formatter.
conventions.error_handling: Explicit error returns, wrapped errors with context
conventions.notes: Well-documented project with extensive coding conventions in docs/ directory. Uses functional options pattern, centralized GVK/GVR definitions, and strict test data organization.

test_commands.notes: All 741+ tests passed across all packages

container_recipe.notes: Requires GOTOOLCHAIN=auto to download Go 1.25.7. golang:1.22 base image works because GOTOOLCHAIN downloads newer version. First lint run downloads golangci-lint dependencies (~1-2 min). Subsequent runs are fast.

results.output_snippet:
go: downloading go1.25.7 (linux/amd64)
(completes with no output)
results.notes: Successfully downloaded Go 1.25.7 toolchain and all dependencies

results.output_snippet:
CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 \
	go build -ldflags "-X 'github.com/opendatahub-io/odh-cli/internal/version.Version=74f26e9' ..." -o bin/kubectl-odh cmd/main.go
results.notes: Binary built successfully, 41MB, version command works

results.output_snippet:
go: github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2@v2.8.0 requires go >= 1.24.0; switching to go1.25.8
0 issues.
results.notes: Clean lint run, 0 issues. First run downloads linter deps (~1-2 min)
All tests passed. 741+ individual tests across 38 packages.

validation.summary: All validation steps passed: install OK, build OK (binary verified working), lint OK (0 issues), tests OK (741+ tests passed)
